metadata.thoughts:
**Determining strike announcement**

I need to figure out if the document announces a new strike. It mentions a general strike on Friday, December 2, stating that public transport in Rome will be affected and that this strike is supported by unions. Real-time updates are available on romamobilita.it. The content clearly says it's regarding an upcoming strike, so I should set the isStrike variable to true. It looks like this is confirming the strike announcement for that specified date.
